user.title: Add OpenAI TTS Service
user.description: Set up OpenAI TTS integration to create TTS agents. API key is required for OpenAI, optional for custom endpoints.

data.name: Account name (optional, e.g. Personal / Work)
data.api_key: API Key (required for OpenAI, optional for custom endpoints)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure OpenAI TTS
reconfigure.description: Update API credentials for this integration.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate OpenAI TTS
reauth_confirm.description: The API key for {title} is no longer valid. Please enter a new API key.

error.wrong_api_key: Invalid API key. Please enter a valid API key.
error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Please check your API key and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to OpenAI API. Please check your network and API endpoint.
error.duplicate_api_key: An entry with this API key already exists. Each integration entry must have a unique API key.

abort.no_options_available: This integration entry has no configurable options. Use the subentries to configure individual TTS agents.
abort.not_supported: Options flow is not supported for this entry

init.title: Configure TTS options
init.description: Configure settings for this TTS profile

data.chime: Enable chime sound prior speech (useful for announcements)
data.normalize_audio: Enable loudness for generated audio (uses more CPU)
data.volume_restore: Restore speaker volumes after TTS playback

user.title: Add TTS Agent (Step 1 of 2)
user.description: Pick a name and the OpenAI model. Voice and audio options come next.

voice_audio.title: Add TTS Agent (Step 2 of 2)
voice_audio.description: Voice and audio options for model {model}. Note: enabling chime or normalize_audio disables streaming (post-processing required).

data.extra_payload: Extra JSON payload (for custom TTS backends)
data.audio_format: Audio format (mp3 is the safe default; switch only if your backend needs another)

reconfigure.title: Update TTS Agent (Step 1 of 2)
reconfigure.description: Pick the model. Voice and audio options come next.

reconfigure_voice.title: Update TTS Agent (Step 2 of 2)
reconfigure_voice.description: Voice and audio options for model {model}. Note: enabling chime or normalize_audio disables streaming (post-processing required).

data.extra_payload: Extra JSON payload (for custom TTS backends)
data.audio_format: Audio format (mp3 is the safe default; switch only if your backend needs another)

error.already_exists: A profile with this name already exists
